Solar Industries failed to get a closing above 18500 on the weekly chart. Though, it already hit the minimum anticipated destination. There's much more heat still left. So, on a weekly TF, it can form an ending diagonal in 5th up. A decline can be seen in wave 2 of 5th of (v) of III, before heading towards wave 3 up as marked. Not a trade recommendation. DYOR. The chart is purely for the study only. #solarinds #solarindustries #nifty #neowave

The gold is still trading near 4077 range, and the weekly closing is at 4080. I would say there can be a small upside bounce, but the anticipated destination is still due that is 3817 and it'll be there eventually. At the same time, investors shouldn't wait for the exact bottom to form. 😀 The current view invalidates if we close above 4400. #gold #xauusd #commodities #neowave

The silver has perfectly followed dot-to-dot and took support near the 56 as mentioned in Elliottedge Pro. Now as long as 56 is held, we can see a rise upto 61/62.8 before the final decline in 5th. The probability is very likely that 56 will be breached 5th will be extended towards the lower levels as the structure in 5th looks incomplete. Once we close above 63, it shall be ready for 72. Not a trade recommendation. DYOR. #Silver #XAGUSD #Commodities

The entire financial analyst Buggy divided into two camps right now. One group expects a strong rally in Silver from these levels, while the other expects a deeper correction. I am the middleman 🥸 serving water to both the Camps !! You can never sell at the exact top, someone will always give you a higher target like ₹7 lakh Similarly, you can never buy at the exact bottom, because that's when pessimism is at its peak. My #investment rule is simple: Buy when fear dominates. Sell when every
